falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern match, as that pattern resolved with lower highs and continued consolidation; this would signal the correction ended and a new leg up began

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained sub-14 VIX indicates complacency and risk-on normalization, contradicting the bottoming pattern which requires elevated volatility and fear; this would prove the market never reached capitulation

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 5+ days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-quality bid driving yields sharply lower would signal recession panic rather than soft-landing bottom, invalidating the pattern which requires rates stabilizing or rising modestly as growth fears ease

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
